why_this_action.summary: The same empty-board distribution-architecture failure is still under an active third-strike churn guard, and this review window already logged both a guard pause and a concrete repair for the current fingerprint; pause duplicate guard churn until the board fingerprint, blocker set, or live-action release window materially changes.
